title: Mister Fantastic/Earth-838
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Mister Fantastic {{!}} Earth-838}} {{CharHub|Mister Fantastic|Reed Richards}} {{AltUniverse|[[Earth-838]]|3=Characters}} {{Character |name = Mister Fantastic |image = Mister Fantastic - Earth-838 Infobox.jpg |real name = Reed Richards{{Ref|DSitMoM}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Mister Fantastic[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CRkWhxhVsH8&ab_channel=TheTonightShowStarringJimmyFallon John Krasinski Talks Reuniting with Steve Carell, Office Fan Theories and Joining the MCU] |nicknames = The Smartest Man Alive{{Ref|DSitMoM}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOD = [[2024/Earth-838|November 22, 2024]]{{Ref|DSitMoM}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |title = Doctor |affiliation = {{Affiliation|FF2E838}}
{{Affiliation|BF}}
{{Affiliation|ILL}} |movie = ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' |actor = [[John Krasinski]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|[[Illuminati|We]] appreciate your concern, Stephen, but it's not the [[Scarlet Witch]] that we fear. From our experience, the greatest danger to the [[Multiverse]], it turns out, is [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]].|Mister Fantastic to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Doctor '''Reed Richards''' was a genius scientist with the ability to stretch his body, which gave him the name '''Mister Fantastic''', under which he acted as the leader of the [[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]]. Richards joined the [[Illuminati]] and helped them [[Battle of Titan/Earth-838|kill]] [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] on [[Titan]]. Richards and the Illuminati later gathered to hear the case of [[Doctor Strange]], though their proceedings were interrupted by [[Scarlet Witch]], who was [[dreamwalking]] using her [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|alternate self]]'s body. Richards confronted Maximoff with his allies, but was swiftly torn apart and killed in the ensuing confrontation. ==Biography== {{MD|Reed Richards (Earth-838)}} ===Illuminati=== ====Joining the Illuminati==== Reed Richards was a brilliant scientist who gained the ability to stretch his limbs at will. Along with three other members, all of whom had also received superhuman abilities, they became a superhero team known as the [[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]], with Richards being given the codename Mister Fantastic. Richards also had children with his wife [[Sue Storm/Earth-838|Sue Storm]]. Richards was regarded both as a great hero and as the smartest man alive; this reputation was what caused [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange]] to recruit him for the [[Illuminati]], a group of powerful individuals that would make the difficult decisions that no one else could. While operating with the Illuminati, Richards founded the [[Baxter Foundation]], a research institute based out of the [[Illuminati Headquarters]] in [[New York City]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====[[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]]==== {{Quote|One night, [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|you]] called [[Illuminati|us]] all together, confessed that you had been [[dreamwalking]], and in your words, 'Things had gotten out of hand.' You never told us the details of what had happened, only that you had inadvertently triggered an [[Incursion]]. You, our friend, had caused the annihilation of another universe.|Mister Fantastic to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} When the Mad Titan [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] launched his [[Infinity War/Earth-838|offensive]], the [[Illuminati]] banded together to stop him. However, [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]] decided to search for ways to stop him on his own, and making use of the [[Darkhold]], began [[dreamwalking]] to find solutions across the [[Multiverse]]. While he was unsuccessful in his searches, the [[:Category:Sorcerer Supreme|Sorcerer Supreme]] continued dreamwalking, only stopping when he caused an [[Incursion]], which led to the destruction of a universe. [[File:Illuminati on Titan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic with the Illuminati on [[Titan]]]] Guilt-ridden by what he had inadventently caused, Strange confessed his deed to Richards and the others, and renounced the Darkhold; instead, the group found the [[Book of Vishanti]] and used it to defeat the Mad Titan on [[Titan]], ending his crusade. Unfortunately, the corruption of the Darkhold had grown too deep within Strange, so the Illuminati, Strange included, decided to eliminate him, as he posed a threat to not only their universe, but to others as well. [[File:Reed Richards & Maria Rambeau.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic holds [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]]'s [[Cloak of Levitation]]]] Mister Fantastic held Strange's [[Cloak of Levitation]] and solemnly watched along with his fellow teammates as Strange was [[Execution of Doctor Strange|executed]] by [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]] with his sonic scream. After this, the group covered up the event, instead claiming Strange sacrificed himself to ultimately defeat Thanos, with [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] taking over Strange's role of Sorcerer Supreme and position within the Illuminati. The group later informed Strange's former love interest [[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] the true circumstances regarding his death.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====Meeting a Doctor Strange Variant==== [[File:Reed Richards of the Fantastic Four.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic introduces himself]] {{Quote|Stephen, your arrival here confuses and destabilizes reality. The larger the footprint you leave behind, the greater the risk of an Incursion.|Mister Fantastic to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} When an alternate [[Doctor Strange]] alongside [[America Chavez]] was discovered in [[Earth-838]], the two were captured by [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]], and Strange was brought before the [[Illuminati]] so they could decide his and Chavez's fates. As Mordo introduced the members, Richards teleported to his council seat with the [[Time Platform]] and greeted Strange, who did not seem to recognize him and quipped about the [[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]]; in return, Richards seemed mildly amused. [[File:Mister Fantastic (Illuminati).png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic explains [[Incursion]]s to [[Doctor Strange]]]] Mister Fantastic then enlightened Strange on the situation: his presence destabilized reality, and amplified the risk of an Incursion occurring. As Strange wasn't familiar with the term, Richards explained the concept and its severity to him. Strange then attempted to warn them about the threat [[Scarlet Witch]] posed to the Multiverse, but he was shut down by [[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Captain Marvel]]. [[File:Reed Richards, Maria Rambeau & Karl Mordo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic states Doctor Strange is the greatest threat to the [[Multiverse]]]] Richards claimed that Strange was more dangerous to the Multiverse than Scarlet Witch, to the latter's confusion, and the Illuminati told him how their version of Doctor Strange was corrupted by the Darkhold and destroyed another universe, leading to his execution; this experience made the group believe that every version of their friend was capable of such destruction, thus their weariness about his presence.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====[[Battle at the Illuminati Headquarters|Attacked by Scarlet Witch]]==== [[File:Mr. Fantastic (Earth-838).png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic is alerted to [[Scarlet Witch]]'s intrusion]] {{Quote|Wanda, stop. You've possessed an [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|innocent woman]], but you can still do the right thing. Let her go. Please. I have children of my own. I understand your pain."
Is their [[Sue Storm/Earth-838|mother]] still alive?"
"Yes."
"Good. There will be someone left to raise them.|[[Scarlet Witch]] and Mister Fantastic|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Before the [[Illuminati]] could decide on [[Doctor Strange]]'s fate, the [[Illuminati Headquarters]] was stormed by [[Scarlet Witch]], [[dreamwalking]] in her [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Earth-838 counterpart]]. She defeated all of the Illuminati's [[Ultron Sentries]] with ease and headed for [[America Chavez]]. Mister Fantastic, [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]], [[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Captain Marvel]] and [[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]] left the trial to stop her, leaving [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] and [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] with Strange and agreeing to vote once the threat was dealt with. [[File:Mister Fantastic (Earth-838).png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic tries to reason with Scarlet Witch]] Just before Scarlet Witch could reach Chavez, the four responding Illuminati members arrived to block her path. Mister Fantastic attempted to reason with Scarlet Witch, appealing to her humanity and relating to her grief, stating he had kids of his own. This only prompted Scarlet Witch to ask if their [[Sue Storm/Earth-838|mother]] was still alive. When Mister Fantastic told her that she was, Scarlet Witch ominously mused that they would still have someone left to look after them. [[File:Mister Fantastic reveals Black Bolt's powers.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic warns Scarlet Witch of [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]]'s power]] Accepting that a peaceful solution was no longer an option, Mister Fantastic tried to intimidate Scarlet Witch into standing down by claiming that Black Bolt could easily destroy her with a mere whisper, only to find that Scarlet Witch had used [[Magic#Chaos Magic|Chaos Magic]] to remove the Inhuman King's mouth. Mister Fantastic and the others could only watch in horror as Black Bolt panicked from the realization and accidentally killed himself by blowing his brains out trying to scream. [[File:Scarlet Witch vs. Mister Fantastic.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic is ripped apart by Scarlet Witch]] Quickly reacting to his teammate's violent demise, Mister Fantastic stretched his arm in an attempt to restrain Scarlet Witch, who easily repelled his attack and raised him into the air with her Chaos Magic. Scarlet Witch then used her powers to rapidly tear his limbs and torso apart, shredding them into strings. Helpless, Mister Fantastic screamed out in agony as Scarlet Witch used her magic to burst his head, killing him instantly while his shredded remains were left scattered across the floor.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Superhuman Elasticity''': [[File:Mister Fantastic (Multiverse of Madness).png|{{AltFloat}}|Mister Fantastic stretching his arm]] Reed Richards was capable of stretching and distorting his anatomy to extraordinary lengths and proportions. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|The smartest man alive: Reed Richards, of the [[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]].|[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Richards was regarded by [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo]] as "The Smartest Man Alive" on their native Earth. Richards' intelligence was so great that he was able to explain abstract [[Multiverse|Multiversal]] concepts such as [[Incursion]]s and their dangers to [[Doctor Strange]], showcasing a knowledge and understanding of the Multiverse that surpassed Strange, despite the latter's status as a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]]. *'''Master Scientist''': Richards is the founder and leader of the [[Baxter Foundation]], a scientific research organization with Multiversal studies as one of its fields. ==Equipment== *'''[[Fantastic Four Uniforms|Fantastic Four Uniform]]''': Richards wore one of the [[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]] uniforms. It was attuned to his elasticity powers, meaning that it also became elastic whenever he used his powers. *'''[[Time Platform]]''': Richards used this teleportation device to enter the Illuminati's council room. ==Facilities== {{Quote|The [[Illuminati Headquarters|building]]'s been breached.|Mister Fantastic to the [[Illuminati]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} *'''[[Illuminati Headquarters]]''': As a member of the [[Illuminati]], Richards occasionally inhabited the team's headquarters, which was located in [[Central Park]], [[New York City]]. He went to the headquarters whenever the Illuminati had a meeting. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}} {{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Sue Storm/Earth-838|Sue Storm]] - Wife *[[Franklin Richards/Earth-838|Franklin Richards]] - Son *[[Valeria Richards]] - Daughter ===Allies=== *[[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]] - Teammates *[[Illuminati]] **[[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] † **[[Professor X/Earth-838|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] † **[[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Maria Rambeau/Captain Marvel]] † **[[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Peggy Carter/Captain Carter]] † **[[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Blackagar Boltagon/Black Bolt]] † **[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo/Baron Mordo]] *[[Baxter Foundation]] **[[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] *[[Ultron Sentries]] *[[Inhuman Royal Family/Earth-838|Inhuman Royal Family]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] † - Victim *[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] *[[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] † - Killer {{Col-end}} ==Behind the Scenes== *Mister Fantastic in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the fourth live-action incarnation of the character, following incarnations portrayed by [[Alex Hyde-White]], {{WPS|Ioan Gruffudd}} and {{WPS|Miles Teller}}. *Mister Fantastic is the only member of the [[Illuminati]] whose actor had not previously played the role in any capacity. *In the early draft of ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'', [[Michael Waldron]] penned a [[List of Post-credits Scenes|post-credits scene]] where Reed Richards was reviewing the events of the movie in the [[Baxter Building]], stretching his hand out to run the sequence back.[https://www.empireonline.com/movies/news/doctor-strange-multiverse-of-madness-reed-richard-post-credits-scene-exclusive Michael Waldron Wrote A Reed Richards Post-Credits Scene For Doctor Strange In The Multiverse Of Madness – Exclusive] *An alternate version of [[Balder the Brave]], portrayed by [[Daniel Craig]], initially occupied Mister Fantastic's spot on the [[Illuminati]]. However, due to concerns surrounding {{WPS|COVID-19}}, Craig backed down from the role and was subsequently replaced by [[John Krasinski]]'s Mister Fantastic.[https://screenrant.com/doctor-strange-2-daniel-craig-cameo-illuminati-details/ Doctor Strange 2: Daniel Craig Reportedly Backed Out Of Major Illuminati Cameo] ==References== {{Gallery|Mister Fantastic/Earth-838/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{WP|Reed Richards|Mister Fantastic}} *{{Marvel|Mister Fantastic}} [[es:Reed Richards/Illuminati]] [[ru:Мистер Фантастик/Иллюминаты]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Hazel Eyes]] [[Category:Scientists]] [[Category:Fantastic Four Members/Earth-838]] [[Category:Illuminati Members]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Scarlet Witch]]
